title: Rich Mediterranean Italian Almonds Pizza
description: A rustic pizza with a fluffy double‑rise base, topped with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, flaked almonds, and aromatic herbs. Served on a heated salt block for a unique crunchy finish.
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, and salt in a large bowl.
Add warm water, olive oil, and knead until dough is smooth.
Cover the dough, let it rise for 1 hour at room temperature.
After the first rise, punch the dough, shape it into a pizza base, and let it rise again for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 200°C and place a salt block inside to heat.
Spread sliced cherry tomatoes over the dough as a base layer.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella evenly over the tomatoes.
Add flaked almonds and chopped basil on top of the cheese.
Drizzle a thin layer of olive oil over the toppings and sprinkle sea salt flakes.
Bake the pizza on the heated salt block for 12 minutes until the crust is golden and the cheese is bubbly.
